description: Regression scenarios for planning anchors, non-interactive defaults, and re-plan mode boundaries.

evals.name: normal-plan-with-explicit-output
evals.prompt: Use ywc-plan --output docs/ywc-plans/billing-dashboard.md to plan a billing dashboard with exportable invoices.
expected_behavior: Clarifies or records the required planning anchors before writing the plan.
Writes or targets the explicit output path.
Produces a spec-ready plan suitable for downstream validation and task generation.
anti_behavior: Starting implementation tasks instead of producing the plan.

evals.name: non-interactive-defaults
evals.prompt: Use ywc-plan --non-interactive for a small CLI helper idea with no explicit Out of Scope.
expected_behavior: Does not pause for clarification prompts.
Uses the documented defaults for missing anchors.
Clearly marks defaulted anchors so later validation can review them.
anti_behavior: Inventing highly specific exclusions not supplied by the user.

evals.name: anti-replan-missing-failure-context
expected_behavior: Does not rewrite the existing spec from scratch.
anti_behavior: Appending vague amendments without the review findings.
Treating update-spec as normal plan generation.
Deleting or replacing validated spec sections.
